raw_prompt: Humanoid biped side-view armored traveler with a lantern, storm-steel palette, one handheld prop.
side_view_constraints: strict side view, readable negative space, prop silhouette distinct from torso
negative_prompt: front view, rear view, top-down, isometric, multiple characters, crowd, group shot, full environment scene, busy background, extra limbs, extra arms, extra weapons, wings, huge cape, non-humanoid anatomy, mount, vehicle, text, watermark, logo
positive_prompt_base: single humanoid side-view character concept art, full body, plain light background, clean silhouette, readable negative space, humanoid biped, silhouette intent: broad, outfit and materials: armored traveler, primary handheld prop: lantern, palette mood: storm steel, shape language: balanced angular to rounded mix, mood: stoic and vigilant, readability constraints: strict side view, readable negative space, prop silhouette distinct from torso
